description_long: This is a modern high-top sneaker featuring a sleek black upper with prominent white stitching and a unique orange sole. The sole is visually striking, constructed with a lattice-like, honeycomb structure that appears both lightweight and durable. The shoe has a pull tab at the heel for easy wearing and a distinctive orange strap or accent running across the tongue, adding a futuristic touch. The upper material appears to be synthetic leather or coated textile, while the sole is likely made of rubber or a similar polymer. The overall design is sporty and urban, suitable for streetwear or casual use. The shoe is clean, with no visible signs of wear, and the construction looks robust and high quality.
description: A modern black high-top sneaker with a bold orange, honeycomb-patterned sole and a prominent orange accent on the tongue. The design is sleek, sporty, and urban.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black upper, white stitching, orange honeycomb sole, and orange accent on the tongue.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the orange accent running down the tongue and the symmetrical lacing system.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the black upper and orange sole with honeycomb pattern.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the pull tab and the full width of the orange honeycomb-patterned sole.
